description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Annotation that triggers on issue comment creation. Run a job on ubuntu-latest if the comment creator is 'cmllr', the issue is a pull request, and the comment body contains '/check'. The job checks out the repository and pull request, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies, runs migrations and a parse command, generates an annotation, and comments on the PR with the result, adding a label based on the annotation content.
